calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lewis Gillian #12355.

Petitioners Alaina Jean Fischer (mother) was present in pro peras guardian ad litem for the Minor Cashin Rourke Passenger Fischer, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by the Minor's Father/Co-Petitioner William Fischer, but signed the petition consented to the name change of the minor.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Cashin Lauck Passenger Fischer.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
